what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-08 in the design-source channel, holding YAML frontmatter fields (id, address, channel, path, blob URI, MIME type, dimensions, source, author session, creation time, links) plus a one-line caption marking it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Created timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
Trailing caption reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-08.jpg'
standouts: Image metadata stub with zero width/height despite being a JPEG
Blob URI used as the canonical content pointer
Explicitly labeled as design ground-truth source material
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable id and URI-style address
Follows ledger-style key/value metadata (channel, path, blob, mime, created)
Includes authorship and provenance fields (author_session, source)
Empty links array is present even when unused
concerns: Width and height are 0 for an image/jpeg record
No alt text, description, or content hash beyond the blob URI
Empty links array leaves related assets unlinked
notes: A metadata ledger card for slide p-08 in the design-source channel, pointing to a blob and tagged as design ground-truth, but it lacks image dimensions and relational links.
questions: What does the blob URI resolve to and is it verifiable?
Should links reference neighboring slides or the parent presentation?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a source design ground-truth image; actual content is a metadata stub with a blob pointer and caption, which partially fulfills that purpose but lacks dimensions and relational context.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog a presentation slide image as a stable, addressable design-source artifact with a blob pointer, authorship, and timestamp so it can be retrieved, attributed, and verified later.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a presentation slide image to its blob identifier, MIME type, source context, and authoring session, which a fused system can use for asset location and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger record for the design-source image 'presentation-15p/p-08' containing a blob pointer, MIME type, authorship timestamp, empty links, and a source ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a design ground-truth image asset from a 15-page presentation.
